message:
fix(doctor): recognize marker-managed hooks, fix stale advice (#2244, #2242)

Doctor's hook version detection only recognized the legacy
bd-hooks-version comment format, missing the current section marker
format (BEGIN BEADS INTEGRATION vX.Y.Z) used by marker-managed
installs (GH#1380). This caused false positives: doctor reported hooks
as outdated/@unknown even when bd hooks list correctly showed them
as current.

Changes:
- parseBDHookVersion: also extract version from section markers
- isBdHookContent: recognize section marker prefix
- CheckGitHooksDoltCompatibility: treat section-marker hooks as
  Dolt-compatible (they call bd hooks run which handles Dolt)
- CheckEmbeddedModeConcurrency: replace stale bd dolt set mode server
  advice (errors since mode is no longer configurable) with bd dolt start

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
